Class DocumentService

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.document.DocumentService
@Service public class DocumentService extends Object

    DocumentService.DocumentDownload
    Detached download payload of a document's current version (filename, MIME type, raw bytes).

  • Method Details

    • createDocument

      @Transactional public DocumentInfo createDocument(String name, Long groupId, PUser user, byte[] content, String mimeType)
      ---------- Creates a new logical document (DocumentInfo) and the first version (Document). ---------- Call this method to create a new document

      -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    • addNewVersion

      @Transactional public Document addNewVersion(Long documentInfoId, PUser user, byte[] content, String mimeType, String comment)
      ---------- Creates a new version for an existing document ----------

      A new document version is beeing created and uploaded.

      ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    • getDocumentHistory

      public List<Document> getDocumentHistory(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
      Returns all versions, newest first
      Parameters:
      documentInfoId -
      user -
      Returns:
      documents

    • getSpecificVersion

      public Document getSpecificVersion(Long documentInfoId, Long version, PUser user)

      public List<DocumentInfo> getDocumentsInGroup(Long groupId, PUser user)
      ---------- Returns all current documents in the given DocumentGroup ----------

      -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    • getDocument

      public DocumentInfo getDocument(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)

    • checkOut

      @Transactional public void checkOut(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
      ----------Checks out a document (lock the document in the DB) ----------

      If documents are beeing edited after download and shall be put back as new version, users must lock the document first to avoid conflicts. -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    • checkIn

      @Transactional public Document checkIn(Long documentInfoId, byte[] content, String mimeType, String comment, PUser user)
      ----------Checks in a document (unlock the document in the DB) ----------

      If documents had been processed and wrítten back to the server , they must be unlock so that other users can edit them too. -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    • cancelCheckOut

      @Transactional public void cancelCheckOut(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
      ----------Cancels a check out process----------

      If user decides to cancel to edit the document without changing anything, there must be a way to simply cancel the checkout and unlock the document without changes. -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    • getExtension

      public String getExtension(String contentType)

    • deleteDocument

      @Transactional public void deleteDocument(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)

    • searchDocumentsByName

      public List<DocumentSummaryDTO> searchDocumentsByName(String name, PUser user)

    • getRecentDocuments

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<DocumentSummaryDTO> getRecentDocuments(PUser user)

    • createDocumentGroup

      public DocumentGroup createDocumentGroup(DocumentGroup group)

    • createDocumentGroup

      @Transactional public DocumentGroup createDocumentGroup(String name, Department dept, PUser user)
      Creates a document group inside a department (for the admin group management screen). Mirrors ResourceService.createResourceGroup(String, Department, PUser): it protects the default group name and requires Action.CREATE on the department. The existing createDocumentGroup(DocumentGroup) (used by the REST controller) is left unchanged.

    • getAllDocumentGroups

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<DocumentGroup> getAllDocumentGroups()

    • getDocumentGroupsByDepartment

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<DocumentGroup> getDocumentGroupsByDepartment(Long departmentId, PUser user)
      Lists the document groups of a department (for the admin group management screen). Requires Action.READ on the department, mirroring DepartmentService.getDepartmentsByCompany(Long, PUser).

    • renameDocumentGroup

      @Transactional public DocumentGroup renameDocumentGroup(Long groupId, String newName, PUser user)
      Renames a document group (the only editable field). The default group is protected — as with deleteDocumentGroup(Long, PUser) it cannot be renamed — and the caller needs Action.UPDATE on it.

    • getDocumentsInGroupAsDTO

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<DocumentSummaryDTO> getDocumentsInGroupAsDTO(Long groupId, PUser user)

    • getDocumentsInGroup

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<DocumentSummaryDTO> getDocumentsInGroup(Long groupId, PUser user, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Paged variant of getDocumentsInGroupAsDTO(Long, PUser) for the admin document list. The admin GUI feeds this into a lazy Vaadin grid so a large group never loads its whole document set into memory at once. Requires Action.READ on the group.

    • countDocumentsInGroup

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public long countDocumentsInGroup(Long groupId, PUser user)
      Count of documents in a group (the count callback for the lazy admin grid). Requires READ on the group.

    • getCurrentVersionForDownload

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public DocumentService.DocumentDownload getCurrentVersionForDownload(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
      The binary payload of a document's current version, for a download-for-control action in the admin GUI (view/download only — the admin never edits or checks out documents). The bytes are read inside the transaction and returned detached in a DocumentService.DocumentDownload. Requires Action.READ.

    • deleteDocumentGroup

      public void deleteDocumentGroup(Long groupId, PUser user)
